data.name: Is It Wrong to Repay the Debt in a Dungeon?
data.detailed_description:
为了还债，母女双双把钱赚！
探索迷宫，挑战强敌，贡献自我，奉献他人！
一切为了拯救家族!!


本游戏为卡牌构筑类Roguelike RPG游戏。
可选择60余种升级型卡牌来搭配组合。
战斗中随机发放卡牌，
选择最合适的卡牌打倒强敌吧！


  • 全语音
  • 卡牌构筑类Roguelike RPG
  • 卡牌升级系统
  • 游戏内置成就系统

data.short_description: 为了还债，母女双双把钱赚！ 探索迷宫，挑战强敌，贡献自我，奉献他人！ 一切为了拯救家族!! 本游戏为卡牌构筑类Roguelike RPG游戏。 可选择60余种升级型卡牌来搭配组合。 战斗中随机发放卡牌， 选择最合适的卡牌打倒强敌吧！
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 10/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

data.name: Is It Wrong to Repay the Debt in a Dungeon?
data.detailed_description:
To repay the debt, both Akane and her mother have to earn a lot of money!
Explore the dungeon, challenge strong enemies, and even use her own body!
Everything she is trying to do is for saving her family!!


This game is a roguelike RPG game with a well-balanced card battle system.
You can use more than 60 kinds of cards which can also be upgraded to fight.
Choose the most appropriate card to defeat strong enemies!


  • Full audio
  • Card battle roguelike RPG
  • Card upgrade system
  • In game achievement

  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
